creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have made a new port 'VPCE'.
VPCE is the PC-Engine emulator on X.
Please ask me the rom images when you need to evaluate this port for commit.

Yukihiro Nakai
